chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-377 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 1822/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 1823/25 4.For hearing of main case 25-03-2025 Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. This petition is maintained only with a prayer that appeal/representation of the petitioner be decided. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General present in Court in connection with other matters waives notice and submits that the respondents will decide the appeal/representation of the petitioner as per law. Order accordingly. Instant petition along with listed applications stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
